action_set_definitions.name: get_environment_status
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current state of the environment, including the active search query, cached results, and the current reading list.

action_set_definitions.name: search_academic_db
action_set_definitions.description: Searches the literature database using keywords and filters to populate the active_result_set.

query.description: The search string targeting specific years or topics (e.g., '1962 neurogenesis').

year_filter.description: Specific publication year to narrow results.

action_set_definitions.name: fetch_paper_metrics
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves detailed epistemic and bibliometric metadata for a specific paper, including Disruption Index and paradigm impact.

paper_id.description: The unique identifier of the paper to inspect.

example_output.title: Mitotic activity in the primate brain

action_set_definitions.name: update_reading_list
action_set_definitions.description: Adds a validated paper to the reading list (bibliography).

paper_id.description: The ID of the paper to save.

action.description: Whether to add or remove the paper.

state_description.current_session_query: The active search string defining the current context.
state_description.active_result_set: A list of paper IDs currently cached in the search results page.
state_description.reading_list: A list of paper IDs the Agent has explicitly saved to the bibliography.
state_description.pagination_index: The current page offset in the database search results.
state_description.last_accessed_paper_id: The ID of the paper currently being inspected for citations or full-text.
